scope: MCP wrapper and bundled Codex skill

checks.name: unit_tests
checks.evidence: Runs the repository unit-test suite for parser, runtime, server, and wrapper behavior.

checks.name: mcp_tool_discovery
checks.evidence: tools/list exposed the three FastContext MCP tools.

checks.name: health_uses_bundled_cli
checks.evidence: fastcontext_health points at the bundled wrapper module.

checks.name: citation_parsing
checks.evidence: fastcontext_explore parsed two FastContext-style file-line citations.

checks.name: trace_output
checks.evidence: fastcontext_explore_with_trace wrote a trajectory under the repo.

checks.name: path_allowlist_guard
checks.evidence: A repo outside FASTCONTEXT_ALLOWED_ROOTS was rejected.

limitations: This evaluation uses a fake fastcontext.cli package to verify wrapper behavior without a GPU or model endpoint.
Local checks are integration QA, not a FastContext before/after impact measurement.
FastContext model-quality claims are not reproduced here; see the Microsoft FastContext paper and model card.
